source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/05. 주요 부품 인증서 + 사양서/60-2230C/MIC_60-2230C/Cert/21-0645_003-170090_Cert.pdf

document.title: Type Certificate
authorityOrJurisdiction: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications
standards: Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law

sourceSummary.oneLine: Type Certificate granted to LAIRD CONNECTIVITY INC for 2.4GHz wide band low power data communication system specified radio equipment.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports Japanese Radio Law construction type certification evidence and related conformity mark and inspection-record obligations.
keyPoints: Certified Number is 003-170090 and Certified Date is March 3, 2021.
Certified equipment classification is Article 2-1-19, 2.4GHz Wide Band low power data communication system.
Model names listed include ST60-2230C, SU60-2230C, and related ST60-2230C variants.
The certificate states certification by type was granted in accordance with Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.
Boilerplate instructions describe GITEKI conformity mark display and inspection record retention for 10 years.

entities.name: Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications
entities.evidence: The Minister of Internal Affairs and Communications can prohibit the certified dealer from affixing the conformity mark

entities.name: Radio Law
entities.evidence: in accordance with the provisions of Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law

concepts.name: 2.4GHz Wide Band low power data communication system
concepts.pageTarget: 2.4GHz Wide Band Low Power Data Communication System
concepts.evidence: 2.4GHz Wide Band low power data communication system

concepts.name: Construction type certification
concepts.evidence: declaring that it has received construction type certification

concepts.name: Technical conformity mark
concepts.evidence: Certification label, technical conformity mark (GITEKI mark), etc.

concepts.name: Certified dealer
concepts.evidence: Entities who have received a construction type certification from DSP Research are defined as a “certified dealer” under the Radio Law.

concepts.name: Inspection records
concepts.evidence: Certified dealer must then “make record of the inspection results” and “retain the inspection records for 10 years.”

concepts.name: Electronic conformity mark display
concepts.evidence: the conformity mark may be electronically shown on the equipment’s display

evidence.claim: The document is a Type Certificate.
evidence.evidenceText: Type Certificate

evidence.claim: The certificate was certified to LAIRD CONNECTIVITY INC.
evidence.evidenceText: Certified to LAIRD CONNECTIVITY INC

evidence.claim: The specified radio equipment classification is Article 2-1-19.
evidence.evidenceText: Classification of specified radio equipment Article 2-1-19

evidence.claim: The certified radio equipment is a 2.4GHz Wide Band low power data communication system.
evidence.evidenceText: 2.4GHz Wide Band low power data communication system
evidence.pageTarget: 2.4GHz Wide Band Low Power Data Communication System

evidence.claim: The emissions, frequency and antenna power include F1D,G1D at 2441MHz with 0.0001 to 0.00065W/MHz.
The emissions, frequency and antenna power include F1D at 2402 to 2480MHz with 2MHz interval, 40 channels, and 0.0086W.
evidence.evidenceText: F1D 2402～2480MHz(2MHz interval 40 channels) 0.0086W

evidence.claim: The model names are ST60-2230C, SU60-2230C, ST60-2230C-P, ST60-2230C-SS, ST60-2230C-PU, ST60-2230C-UU, ST60-2230C-U or ST60-2230C-Q.
The vendor name is LAIRD CONNECTIVITY INC.
evidence.evidenceText: Vendor Name LAIRD CONNECTIVITY INC

evidence.claim: The Certified Number is 003-170090.
evidence.evidenceText: Certified Number 003-170090

evidence.claim: The Certified Date is March 3, 2021.
evidence.evidenceText: Certified Date March 3, 2021

evidence.claim: The certificate remark number is No.21-0645.
evidence.evidenceText: Remark No.21-0645

evidence.claim: The certificate relates to Bluetooth.
evidence.evidenceText: Bluetooth

evidence.claim: Certification by type was granted in accordance with Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.
evidence.evidenceText: This is to certify that the above mentioned certification by type has been granted in accordance with the provisions of Article 38-24, Paragraph 1 of the Radio Law.

evidence.claim: A certified dealer may display the conformity mark for specified radio equipment after fulfilling the Article 38-25 obligation.
evidence.evidenceText: According to Article 38-26 of the Radio Law (hereinafter referred to as the Law), when the certified dealer fulfills the obligation specified in Article 38-25 of the Law, he/she is allowed to display the conformity mark for specified radio equipment

evidence.claim: If the conformity mark is not displayed, the equipment is not recognized as radio equipment with conformity mark and is subject to separate radio station licensing.
evidence.evidenceText: If the conformity mark is not displayed, the equipment will not be recognized as “radio equipment with conformity mark” as specified in Articles 4-2 and 4-3 of the Law, and is subject to obtaining a separate license for radio station.

evidence.claim: Entities receiving construction type certification from DSP Research are certified dealers under the Radio Law.
evidence.evidenceText: Entities who have received a construction type certification from DSP Research are defined as a “certified dealer” under the Radio Law.

evidence.claim: The conformity mark may be affixed at a readily visible location on specified radio equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: it shall be affixed at a readily visible location on the specified radio equipment based on a certified construction type

evidence.claim: The conformity mark may be electronically recorded and clearly displayed on the image screen of the specified radio equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: it (the conformity mark) shall be recorded using an electronic visual display method on the specified radio equipment based on a certified construction type, and shall be able to be immediately displayed clearly on the image screen of the applicable specified radio equipment

evidence.claim: Before shipping certified products, a certified dealer must inspect for performance identical to the certified construction type.
evidence.evidenceText: Before shipping the certified product, a certified dealer shall “inspect” to make sure the product has performance identical to that of the certified construction type.
evidence.pageTarget: Obligation To Conform To Construction Types

evidence.claim: A certified dealer must make inspection-result records and retain inspection records for 10 years.
evidence.evidenceText: Certified dealer must then “make record of the inspection results” and “retain the inspection records for 10 years.”

evidence.claim: Article 19 of the certification regulations lists required inspection record information.
evidence.evidenceText: The information to be provided in the inspection records mentioned in Article 38-25, Paragraph 2 of the Law shall be as follows

evidence.claim: Inspection records must be retained for ten years from the date of inspection.
evidence.evidenceText: The inspection records mentioned in the preceding Paragraph must be retained for ten years from the date of the inspection.

evidence.claim: Article 20 of the certification regulations specifies methods for affixing the mark.
evidence.evidenceText: When affixing the mark in accordance with Article 38-26 of the Law, one of the following methods shall be used.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority is partly ambiguous: the certificate names DSP Research, Inc. and cites the Radio Law and Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications, but does not explicitly label a single issuing authority field.
Product signal is Unclassified in source metadata, while the source text identifies model names and Bluetooth radio equipment.
Source text includes boilerplate and fragmented passages about 5GHz/IEEE 802.11a devices that appear separate from the certified 2.4GHz Bluetooth equipment.
No separate document revision field is present; revisionOrVersion is populated from the visible remark number No.21-0645.
